_comment: Per-model metadata for the /dinosaur-3d cluster photoreal-asset layer. Hand-authored; make-dinosaur-3d-manifest.mjs hashes each .glb and emits manifest.json. Every entry MUST be freely redistributable (CC0 / CC-BY / CC-BY-SA / public-domain; SA entries: the re-hosted derivative stays under the same ShareAlike license - see CREDITS.txt), verified per-file (see licenses/CREDITS.txt). 'targetLenUnits' is the scene-unit length the viewer scales the model's longest axis to (12 matches the size-vs-human reference in the page). 'kind' = fleshed | skeleton (drives the honesty disclosure).

tyrannosaurus-rex.credit: T. rex model by Quaternius (CC0, via Poly Pizza)

velociraptor.credit: Velociraptor model by Quaternius (CC0, via Poly Pizza)

triceratops.credit: Triceratops model by Quaternius (CC0, via Poly Pizza)

stegosaurus.credit: Stegosaurus model by Quaternius (CC0, via Poly Pizza)

apatosaurus.credit: Apatosaurus model by Quaternius (CC0, via Poly Pizza)

parasaurolophus.credit: Parasaurolophus model by Quaternius (CC0, via Poly Pizza)

diplodocus.credit: Diplodocus model by Poly by Google (CC-BY 3.0, via Poly Pizza)

spinosaurus.credit: Spinosaurus model by Tuomo Untinen (CC-BY-SA 3.0, via OpenGameArt; decimated glTF conversion, same license)

pteranodon.credit: Pterosaur model by pistachio (CC0, via OpenGameArt; glide-pose glTF conversion)

ground-sloth.credit: Ground Sloth (Megatherium) model by Poly by Google (CC-BY 3.0, via Poly Pizza)

pachyrhinosaurus.credit: Pachyrhinosaurus model by SUMO STUDIOS (CC-BY 4.0, via OpenGameArt; decimated glTF conversion)

deinonychus.credit: Deinonychus model by Animaniac888 (CC0, via OpenGameArt 'Dromaeosaur'; textured glTF conversion)

utahraptor.credit: Dromaeosaurid model by Animaniac888 (CC0, via OpenGameArt 'Dromaeosaur'; shown for Utahraptor, the largest known dromaeosaurid, at species scale)

ankylosaurus.credit: Ankylosaurus model by Manicaeks (CC0, via OpenGameArt; textured glTF conversion)

carnotaurus.credit: Carnotaurus model by Mike Carey (CC-BY 3.0, via OpenGameArt; diffuse-color glTF conversion)

allosaurus.credit: Allosaurus model by DragonArtist15 (CC-BY-SA 4.0, via Printables; scientifically-accurate posed sculpt, decimated STL->glTF with applied countershading, same ShareAlike license)

dilophosaurus.credit: Dilophosaurus model by DragonArtist15 (CC-BY-SA 4.0, via Printables; scientifically-accurate posed sculpt with scale + feather detail, decimated STL->glTF with applied countershading, same ShareAlike license)

baryonyx.credit: Baryonyx model by seth the yutyrannus (CC-BY 4.0, via Printables; OBJ->glTF conversion with applied countershading)

plesiosaurus.credit: Plesiosaurus model by MZ4250 (CC-BY 4.0, via Printables; STL->glTF conversion with applied countershading)

gallimimus.credit: Gallimimus model by DragonArtist15 (CC-BY-SA 4.0, via Printables; scientifically-accurate feathered sculpt, decimated STL->glTF with applied countershading, same ShareAlike license)

mosasaurus.credit: Mosasaurus model by MZ4250 (CC-BY 4.0, via Printables; STL->glTF conversion with applied countershading)

pachycephalosaurus.credit: Pachycephalosaurus model by DragonArtist15 (CC-BY-SA 4.0, via Printables; scientifically-accurate posed sculpt with scale + skin detail, decimated STL->glTF with applied countershading, same ShareAlike license)

brachiosaurus.credit: Brachiosaurus model by gabi123 (CC0, via Printables; decimated STL->glTF with applied countershading)
